sections.description: Vue 3 Composition API composables for dashboard state management.
sections.purpose: Encapsulate reactive state and business logic (time range selection, auto-refresh scheduling, Prometheus data fetching/parsing) as reusable composable functions, keeping components thin.
strengths: No external state library needed — Vue refs + composables are sufficient for this single-page app
useDashboardData parses all Prometheus responses into a single typed DashboardData object
useAutoRefresh properly cleans up intervals on unmount
weaknesses: useDashboardData makes 11 API calls per refresh (8 instant + 3 range); could batch or cache
No loading/pending state exposed from useDashboardData
sections.functionality:
- useTimeRange: selectedRange ref (default '30d'), STEP_MAP, RANGE_SECONDS, TIME_RANGE_OPTIONS constants
- useAutoRefresh: 30s interval toggle with enabled ref, start/stop/toggle methods, auto-cleanup on unmount
- useDashboardData: orchestrates all Prometheus fetches, parses responses into DashboardData interface (totalTokens, totalCost, totalActive, totalSessions, totalCommits, totalPRs, linesAdded/Removed, modelTokens, costByModel, langCounts, toolCounts, accept/reject, activeTimeBySession, tokensRange, costRange, locRange), exposes data/error/lastUpdated refs
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| useTimeRange.ts | Time range selection state, step/range constants |
| useAutoRefresh.ts | 30s interval auto-refresh with toggle and cleanup |
| useDashboardData.ts | Prometheus data fetching, parsing, and reactive state management |
